title: byrsonima lanceolata var. pinetorum
intro: Byrsonima lanceolata var. pinetorum, also known as the Pinewood Byrsonima, is a plant species within the Malpighiaceae family. It is native to South America, where it grows as a shrub in tropical forests. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Byrsonima lanceolata var. pinetorum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
